zh.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun是William de Verdun Framlingham和Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham的兒子，於1165年出生。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1236年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun是William de Verdun Framlingham和Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham的儿子，于1165年出生。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1236年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Wido
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Fumi, Hiroshi, Satoshi, Atsuo, Atsushi, Chieko, Fumiko, Fumio, Hiro, Hirofumi, Hiromitsu, Hisao.

Japanese: variously written, usually 木戸 ‘wooden door’; a less common rendering is 城戸 ‘castle door’. It is found in western Japan. One family of samurai came from Suō (now part of Yamaguchi prefecture).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun was born in 1165 as the son of William de Verdun Framlingham and Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1236, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun est né en 1165, fils de William de Verdun Framlingham et Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1236, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun wurde 1165, als Sohn von William de Verdun Framlingham und Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1236 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun è nato il nel 1165 come figlio di William de Verdun Framlingham e Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1236, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdunは1165年にWilliam de Verdun FramlinghamとMrs William de Verdun Framlinghamの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1236年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun(은)는 1165년 William de Verdun Framlingham(와)과 Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1236년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun nasceu em 1165 filho de William de Verdun Framlingham e Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1236, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun родился в 1165 г. Его родителей звали William de Verdun Framlingham и Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1236 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Wido Hugh de Verdun nació en 1165 como hijo de William de Verdun Framlingham y Mrs William de Verdun Framlingham. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1236, a la edad de 71 años.
